meta.title: The Realignment Ep. 33: Matt Stoller, the COVID-19 Economy
meta.description: Matt Stoller, Director of Research at the American Economic Liberties Project, returns to The Realignment to discuss the structure of the economy during and after the COVID-19 outbreak
